message:
feat(freeze): Convert insert, permutation, and nop operations to Zig

Converted insert operations (3 ops):
- insert2: [a,b] -> [b,a,b] - insert top before second, keep top
- insert3: [a,b,c] -> [c,a,b,c] - insert top at bottom, keep top
- insert4: [a,b,c,d] -> [d,a,b,c,d] - insert top at bottom, keep top
  All use FROZEN_DUP for the inserted copy

Converted permutation operations (3 ops):
- perm3: [a,b,c] -> [b,c,a] - rotate 3 values left
- perm4: [a,b,c,d] -> [b,c,d,a] - rotate 4 values left
- perm5: [a,b,c,d,e] -> [b,c,d,e,a] - rotate 5 values left

Converted nop operation:
- nop: No operation, only emits debug comment when enabled

All operations maintain exact stack semantics with:
- Direct stack[@intCast(sp - N)] access in Zig
- Proper reference counting with qjs.FROZEN_DUP
- Explicit sp increment for push operations
